notes: Fixed TS2741 missing `init` property errors. Two changes: (1) Added missing `yield* RecordStressWaveTool` and `yield* RecordExecutionWaveTool` in the init block. (2) Changed `Tool.init(RecordStressWaveTool)` and `Tool.init(RecordExecutionWaveTool)` to use the unwrapped variables `recordStressWave` / `recordExecutionWave`.
